parameters.jsCode: return [{json: {topics: ["network effects in local business marketing", "hyperlocal marketing strategies 2026", "AI personalization for small businesses", "community-led growth playbook", "word-of-mouth marketing systems", "referral program design that works", "local SEO tactics for service businesses", "building brand trust in digital age", "customer retention vs acquisition math", "social proof optimization strategies", "micro-influencer marketing ROI", "email marketing for local businesses", "Google Business Profile optimization", "viral content formulas for B2C brands", "paid social vs organic reach 2026"]}}];

assignments.name: systemPrompt
assignments.value: You are a marketing strategist writing for The Atomic Network (theatomicnetwork.com) — a publication about growth, marketing, and network effects for modern businesses. Write with authority, use data, be practical and direct. Target audience: marketing managers, growth hackers, and business owners.

assignments.name: userPrompt
assignments.value:
Write a comprehensive, SEO-optimized article about: {{ $json.topic }}

Requirements:
- 1200-1800 words
- Start with a compelling intro (no H1 needed)
- Use H2 headers for main sections, H3 for subsections
- Include practical tactics, not just theory
- Add specific examples and if possible, metrics/numbers
- End with actionable next steps
- NO frontmatter, just the article body

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({chat_id: '-1003767033253', text: '⚛️ Ny artikel publicerad \u2013 tan-website.netlify.app\n\uD83D\uDCCC ' + $('Format Article').item.json.title + '\n\uD83D\uDD17 ' + ($('Publish via OpenClaw').item.json.url || 'Publicerad!'), parse_mode: 'HTML'}) }}
